title: Puerto Banus Catamaran Sunset Charter Guide & Costs 2026
html:
Puerto Banus, the glamorous marina on Spain's Costa del Sol, is a prime departure point for sunset catamaran charters, with prices typically ranging from 1,500 to 4,000 EUR for a private crewed experience. BoatHire24 connects you directly with verified operators to make your booking seamless.

Why choose a catamaran for sunset in Puerto Banus?

A catamaran offers stability, space, and panoramic views, making it ideal for sunset cruising. Unlike monohulls, catamarans have wide decks and a shallow draft, allowing you to anchor close to the shore in places like the Bay of Marbella. The evening light on the Mediterranean, combined with the silhouette of the Sierra Blanca mountains, creates a memorable atmosphere. You can also see more at check availability.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Charters typically depart from the main Puerto Banus Marina, located in the heart of the complex. Nearby alternatives include the smaller Marbella Marina, about three nautical miles east, and Cabopino Marina to the west, known for the protected dunes of Artola. For a longer trip, boats often head towards the coastline of San Pedro de Alcantara or the exclusive residential area of La Zagaleta visible from the sea.

Which boat to rent for a sunset charter

  1. Catamaran, best for groups and stability; capacity up to 12 guests; from 1,800 EUR for a half-day.
  2. Motor yacht, ideal for speed and luxury; capacity up to 10 guests; from 2,500 EUR for a half-day.
  3. Sailboat, perfect for a more traditional, quiet experience; capacity up to 8 guests; from 600 EUR for a half-day.
  4. RIB or day boat, suited for agile exploration; capacity up to 6 guests; from 400 EUR for two hours.

For catamarans, the Shashani (a 43-foot Leopard model) is a popular choice; you can find the Shashani for hire on BoatHire24.

How much does a sunset catamaran charter cost in 2026?

Prices vary by boat size, duration, and included services, but most private charters range from 1,500 to 4,000 EUR. To give you a clearer picture, here is a breakdown of typical price bands:

  • Shared sunset tour on a catamaran: from 80 EUR per person, usually including drinks and snacks.
  • Small motorboat or RIB half-day: 350, 600 EUR for up to six guests.
  • Private catamaran full-day charter: 2,000, 4,000 EUR, often with crew and a full bar.
  • Crewed luxury yacht (60 feet+): from 5,000 EUR upwards, with a skipper and hostess.

You can always browse boats for your dates on the site to compare verified listings and check live availability.

Seasons and licence requirements

The high season runs from June to September, when the Poniente wind provides warm, stable evenings ideal for sunset. For most charter boats, the operator provides a skipper, so no licence is needed. However, if you wish to self-drive a smaller boat, a valid International Certificate of Competence (ICC) is typically required; the operator will confirm the exact requirements for your chosen craft.

Local tip: book your charter for 7:00 pm in summer to catch the golden hour as the sun dips behind the Rock of Gibraltar, visible on a clear day from Puerto Banus.

At a glance

  • Price range: 1,500, 4,000 EUR for private catamaran charter
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: 2, 4 hours for sunset cruise
  • Capacity: up to 12 guests on most catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I charter a catamaran for a sunset trip without a licence?

Yes, all crewed charters include a skipper, so no licence is required.

What is included in the price of a catamaran charter?

Most private charters include a professional crew, fuel, insurance, and sometimes drinks and snacks.

How far in advance should I book a sunset charter?

In high season, it is wise to book at least two weeks ahead to secure your preferred date and boat.

Booking through BoatHire24 is straightforward; you can read the booking FAQ for more details.

Whether you are planning a romantic evening or a celebration with friends, renting a catamaran in Puerto Banus offers a view of the Costa del Sol that is hard to match. Check availability on BoatHire24 and compare boats in your favourite marina.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
